heroEyebrow: Clinical herbalist · Naturopath · Former elite athlete
heroDesc: I work with women who are tired of being dismissed. With athletes whose bodies have stopped cooperating. With anyone who suspects there is a different way — and needs someone who has walked that road themselves.
introBody1: I did not come to herbal medicine through a textbook. I came through seven years of being failed by conventional medicine — through a body I barely recognised, a career cut short, and a determination that an alternative had to exist. When I found plant medicine, it worked. Slowly, painstakingly, with a great deal of trial and error. But it worked.
introBody2: That experience — of navigating endometriosis, PCOS, and chronic fatigue without a roadmap — is the foundation of everything I do in clinic. I know what it means to search for answers when the system isn't giving you any. I know what it feels like when something finally does.
whoTitle: Who I work with — and why
whoDesc: My practice is not generalist by accident. Every specialism I hold, I hold because I have direct experience of it — as a patient, as an athlete, or as a practitioner who spent two years in student clinic working with exactly these presentations.

whoCards.title: Women with hormonal conditions
whoCards.desc: Endometriosis, PCOS, chronic fatigue, perimenopause, fertility, menstrual irregularity. I have lived these conditions. I have also spent two years treating them in clinic. The combination is rare.

whoCards.title: Athletes & active people
whoCards.desc: I trained at national level. I understand performance, recovery, overtraining, and the very specific grief of a body that won't cooperate. Adaptogen protocols, inflammation, hormonal disruption in athletes.

whoCards.title: People exhausted by burnout
whoCards.desc: Stress, nervous system dysregulation, adrenal fatigue, the quiet erosion of a life run on empty. Herbal medicine and naturopathy have deep tools for this. Indian head massage offers something immediate.

differentTitle: A practitioner who has been where you are
differentDesc1: There are many qualified herbalists. Fewer have navigated the exact conditions they treat. Fewer still bring together Western herbalism, naturopathy, TCM-informed dispensary training, Ayurvedic study, bodywork, and the understanding of a former high-performance athlete — and conduct consultations in both English and French.
differentDesc2: This is not a list of certificates. It is a way of seeing the whole person in front of me.

differentItems.title: Lived authority in hormonal health
differentItems.desc: Personal recovery from endometriosis, PCOS and chronic fatigue. Two years of student clinic specialising in these conditions. Not theoretical — experiential.

differentItems.title: French phytotherapy tradition
differentItems.desc: Rooted in a European relationship with plant medicine that is older and more clinically integrated than the UK tradition. A different lens — and a richer one.

differentItems.title: Cross-tradition depth
differentItems.desc: Western herbalism, TCM (six months in a dispensary), Ayurveda. I draw on the most appropriate tools for your specific case — not one framework applied to everyone.

differentItems.title: The athlete's understanding
differentItems.desc: A national-level sporting career gives me a particular fluency with performance bodies — their logic, their limits, and what it costs when they fail you.

differentItems.title: Bilingual practice
differentItems.desc: Consultations in English and French. Clients in the UK, France, Belgium, Québec, and beyond. Your language, your comfort, your care.

processTitle: From first conversation to lasting change

processSteps.title: Discovery call
processSteps.desc: Free · 15 minutes. We talk about where you are and what you need. No commitment. Just honesty.

processSteps.title: Initial consultation
processSteps.desc: 90 minutes. Full case history. Your story, not just your symptoms. A written protocol follows within 48 hours.

processSteps.title: Your protocol
processSteps.desc: Personalised herbal formulations, naturopathic guidance, lifestyle adjustments. Made for your body.

processSteps.title: Ongoing support
processSteps.desc: Follow-ups, adjustments, monthly retainers for ongoing clients. Healing takes time. I stay with you.

testimonials.text: I left the Indian head massage feeling like I was floating. I genuinely forgot where I had parked my car. Something in my neck that has been tight for two years just... wasn't anymore.
testimonials.author: Student clinic client

internationalTitle: Your language. Your timezone. Your care.
internationalDesc1: Most of my consultations happen online. That means clients in France can work with a practitioner who understands the French phytotherapy tradition. Clients in Australia, the US, or the Gulf can access a qualified European herbalist in their own time zone. No geography, no compromise.
internationalDesc2: I practise in English and French, and I understand the particular comfort of discussing your health in your mother tongue.

regions.name: United Kingdom
regions.desc: Online & in person. Base market. NIMH registered.

regions.name: North America
regions.desc: US & Canada. High demand, underserved integrative practitioners.

regions.name: Australia & New Zealand
regions.desc: Strong CAM culture. Premium market. Online.

regions.name: Middle East
regions.desc: UAE, KSA. Herbal traditions valued. Diaspora communities.

regions.name: Francophone Africa
regions.desc: West & Central Africa. Plant medicine deeply rooted culturally.

ctaTitle: If any part of this sounds like your story — let's talk.
ctaDesc: A free 15-minute discovery call. No pressure, no sales pitch. Just an honest conversation about where you are and whether I am the right person to support you.
